title.en: Huge Snicko VAR call prolongs Ronaldo's last dance but ends Modric's

title.en: Late VAR drama as Portugal beat Croatia to keep Ronaldo's World Cup dream alive
title.zh-CN: 晚期VAR戏剧，葡萄牙击败克罗地亚，让罗纳尔多的世界杯梦想得以实现

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dreams were kept alive in controversial fashion as he helped Portugal fight back from a goal down to beat Croatia 2-1 and set up a mouth-watering last-16 tie with Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的世界杯梦想以有争议的方式保持活力，因为他帮助葡萄牙从进球中反击，以2比1击败克罗地亚，并与西班牙建立了令人垂涎的最后16场比赛。

title.en: Switzerland beat Algeria to secure first World Cup knockout win in 88 years
title.zh-CN: 瑞士击败阿尔及利亚取得88年来首次世界杯淘汰赛胜利

summary.en: Switzerland finally ended their World Cup knockout hoodoo by beating Algeria 2-0 to set up a last-16 meeting with either Colombia or Ghana.
summary.zh-CN: 瑞士最终以2比0击败阿尔及利亚，与哥伦比亚或加纳举行了最后16场会议，从而结束了他们的世界杯淘汰赛。
